final:
module mux4_1(
    output reg Y,
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input [1:0] S
);

always @(*) begin
    Y = (S == 2'b00) ? A :
        (S == 2'b01) ? B :
        (S == 2'b10) ? C :
        D;
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y <= A; // This statement should never be executed
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Y <= A; // This statement should never be executed
